schemes.title: PM-Kisan
schemes.extractedText: The benefit shall be provided to all landholding farmer families having cultivable land up to 2 hectares.
schemes.summary: ₹6,000/year to farmers with ≤2 hectares via direct cash transfer.

translations.hi: पीएम-किसान: 2 हेक्टेयर तक के किसानों को ₹6000 वार्षिक सहायता।

schemes.title: State Agriculture Subsidy
schemes.extractedText: All registered cultivators eligible for crop compensation. Offline revenue tokens accepted.
schemes.summary: State farming compensation. Offline token accepted.

translations.hi: राज्य कृषि सब्सिडी: ऑफलाइन टोकन स्वीकृत।

schemes.title: Kisan Credit Card
schemes.extractedText: Short term credit to farmers for crop production, post-harvest expenses, and consumption requirements at subsidized interest rates.
schemes.summary: Subsidized credit up to ₹3 lakhs at 4% interest for farmers.

schemes.title: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Crop insurance scheme covering all food & oilseed crops and annual commercial/horticultural crops with premium of 2% for Kharif and 1.5% for Rabi.
schemes.summary: Crop insurance at 2% premium for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops.

schemes.title: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.extractedText: Soil Health Cards issued to farmers carrying crop-wise recommendations of nutrients and fertilizers.
schemes.summary: Free soil testing and nutrient recommendations for farmers.

schemes.title: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Ensuring access to water for every farm through micro-irrigation, watershed development, and water management.
schemes.summary: Subsidized micro-irrigation (drip/sprinkler) for water-efficient farming.

schemes.title: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
schemes.extractedText: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities. Pan-India electronic trading portal networking existing APMC mandis.
schemes.summary: Online platform for farmers to sell produce at best prices across mandis.

eligibility.criterion: All farmers & traders with valid ID

schemes.title: National Food Security Mission
schemes.extractedText: Financial assistance for demonstration of improved technologies, distribution of HYV seeds and plant protection chemicals.
schemes.summary: Subsidized seeds, fertilizers & technology demos for rice, wheat, pulses farmers.

schemes.title: Central Scholarships
schemes.extractedText: "The family income from all sources shall not exceed ₹4,50,000 (Four Lakhs Fifty Thousand) per annum. Applicant must be enrolled in a recognized institution under UGC/AICTE/State University."
schemes.summary: Scholarships for college students with family income <₹4.5 Lakhs.

translations.hi: केंद्रीय छात्रवृत्ति: आय ₹4.5 लाख से कम।

schemes.title: Post Matric Scholarship for SC
schemes.extractedText: The scholarships are open to nationals of India belonging to Scheduled Castes. Family income ≤ ₹2,50,000.
schemes.summary: Financial aid for SC students. Income <₹2.5 Lakhs.

schemes.title: National Fellowship for ST
schemes.extractedText: Financial assistance is provided to ST students for higher education. Family income ≤ ₹6.0 Lakh.
schemes.summary: Fellowships for ST students in higher education. Income <₹6L.

schemes.title: PM-JAY Health
schemes.extractedText: Health cover of Rs. 5,00,000 per family per year shall be provided for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
schemes.summary: ₹5 lakh health cover per family for hospitalization.

schemes.title: PM Awas Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Affordable housing for EWS/LIG households. EWS income up to Rs. 3,00,000; LIG: Rs. 3,00,001 to Rs. 6,00,000.
schemes.summary: Affordable housing with interest subsidy for income ≤₹6L.

eligibility.criterion: Must not own pucca house in India

schemes.title: MGNREGA
schemes.extractedText: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
schemes.summary: 100 days guaranteed employment for rural households.

eligibility.criterion: Willing to do unskilled manual work

schemes.title: EWS Certification
schemes.extractedText: Gross annual family income below Rs. 8 lakh identified as EWS for benefit of reservation.
schemes.summary: 10% reservation for income <₹8 Lakhs (General category).

schemes.title: OBC Non-Creamy Layer Certificate
schemes.extractedText: OBC whose gross annual income does not exceed ₹8,00,000 fall under the Non-Creamy Layer.
schemes.summary: 27% reservation for OBC with income <₹8 Lakhs.

schemes.title: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 provided in three installments for the first living child.
schemes.summary: ₹5,000 maternity benefit for pregnant women (first child).

schemes.title: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Free short term training with placement assistance aligned with NSQF.
schemes.summary: Free skill training for youth aged 15-45 with placement support.

schemes.title: PM Mudra Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Loans up to ₹10 lakh provided to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.summary: Business loans up to ₹10L without collateral for micro enterprises.

schemes.title: PM-Vidyalaxmi Scholarship Scheme
schemes.extractedText: Interest-free education loans up to ₹10 Lakhs for meritorious students.
schemes.summary: Interest-free education loans for higher studies.

schemes.title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Savings scheme for girl child with 8.2% interest.
schemes.summary: High-interest savings (8.2%) for girl child.

schemes.title: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.extractedText: Zero-balance bank account with accident insurance.
schemes.summary: Zero-balance bank account with insurance & debit card.

schemes.title: Pravasi Bharatiya Sahayata 1
schemes.extractedText: Distressed NRI workers are eligible for free flight repatriation and legal aid.
schemes.summary: Legal and financial aid for overseas Indian workers.

schemes.title: Bhoomi Sudhar Subsidy 2
schemes.extractedText: Farmers with < 5 acres get 50% subsidy on land levelling machinery.
schemes.summary: Grant for soil conditioning and land levelling.

schemes.title: Kisan Debt Relief Tier 3
schemes.extractedText: Waiver of 50% outstanding principal for distressed regional farmers.
schemes.summary: One-time settlement for agricultural loans.

schemes.title: Mahila Sashaktikaran Nidhi 4
schemes.extractedText: Female applicants receive 100% margin money subsidy up to 2 Lakhs.
schemes.summary: Empowering women entrepreneurs with collateral-free loans.

schemes.title: SC/ST Development Scheme Block 5
schemes.extractedText: SC/ST individuals receive free residential training in modern trades.
schemes.summary: Capacity building and skill training for marginalized groups.

schemes.title: Basic Income Guarantee Pilot 6
schemes.extractedText: Households with 0 income receive a safety net of ₹2000 per month.
schemes.summary: Direct bank transfer for extreme poverty households.

schemes.title: Antyodaya Anna Rasam 7
schemes.extractedText: BPL families receive 35kg of foodgrains per month at ₹1/kg.
schemes.summary: Subsidized food grain distribution for BPL families.

schemes.title: Digital Literacy Mission 8
schemes.extractedText: Class 10+ students in rural districts receive a free connected tablet.
schemes.summary: Free laptops and tablets for rural students.

schemes.title: Swasthya Suraksha Bima 9
schemes.extractedText: Individuals above 60 years receive free comprehensive annual health checkups.
schemes.summary: Free diagnostic procedures for senior citizens.

schemes.title: Innovation Seed Fund Phase 10
schemes.extractedText: DPIIT startups receive 20L equity-free grant for prototyping and market entry.
schemes.summary: Early-stage seed capital for DPIIT-recognized tech startups.

schemes.title: Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship Division 11
schemes.extractedText: Students scoring above 85% with family income < 3 Lakhs receive 100% tuition waiver.
schemes.summary: Full tuition waiver for underprivileged higher-education students.

schemes.title: Micro Enterprise Growth 'Delhi' Initiative 12
schemes.extractedText: Loans up to 5 Lakhs are provided to registered MSMEs with a 2% interest subvention.
schemes.summary: Financial assistance and tax rebates for expanding micro-businesses.
